overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character inside a Thorton brand vehicle, then exiting and approaching two guards standing outside the 2nd Amendment gun shop in a sunlit desert industrial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic vehicle interior with Thorton branding

agents.ego_description: examining the vehicle interior, panning across the dashboard and seats

entered.detail: futuristic car dashboard with Thorton brand name embossed on the passenger side
black steering wheel with silver accents and control buttons
black leather passenger seat with vertical stitching
center console with cup holders and gear controls

segments.scene_description: The player is seated inside a Thorton brand vehicle, panning the camera around the detailed interior showing the dashboard, steering wheel, and leather seats in mixed lighting conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle interior facing driver's side window

events.description: camera shifts toward the driver's side window revealing a parked blue truck outside
blue truck fills the left side of the frame as the camera moves closer to the window

agents.ego_description: turning toward the driver's side to look out the window at the surroundings

entered.detail: vintage blue pickup truck with rust patches parked alongside the vehicle
tall industrial corrugated metal fencing in the background
red neon sign reading 2ND AMENDMENT on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the driver's side window, revealing a blue pickup truck parked alongside and a corrugated metal building with a red neon sign reading 2nd Amendment in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior parking area beside industrial building

events.description: player opens the car door and begins exiting the vehicle
transition from shaded car interior to bright direct sunlight outside

agents.ego_description: opening the car door and stepping out onto the concrete ground beside the vehicle

entered.detail: dark corrugated metal building exterior with industrial styling
electronic security device mounted on a pole near the entrance
large industrial metal double doors with horizontal slats

segments.scene_description: The player exits the vehicle, transitioning from the enclosed car interior to the bright exterior. The camera shows the car door opening and the industrial building facade with security equipment coming into view.

events.description: player walks toward the two guards standing at the entrance doors

agents.ego_description: walking toward the entrance of the 2nd Amendment shop, approaching the two guards standing by the metal doors

notable_agents.action: female guard standing with arms crossed near the left side of the door
male guard with face covering and leather jacket standing near the right side of the door

segments.scene_description: The player walks toward the entrance of the 2nd Amendment gun shop, where a female and male guard stand on either side of the metal double doors. The camera approaches the entrance as the guards remain stationary in the bright sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that moves from the enclosed interior of a vehicle into the bright, sunlit expanse of a desert industrial area. It begins with a pan across the detailed dashboard, steering wheel, and leather seats of a Thorton vehicle before shifting toward the driver's side window to reveal a blue pickup truck and a corrugated metal building marked by a red neon 2nd Amendment sign. As the player exits the car, the camera transitions from the dim cabin to the harsh exterior light, passing the open car door to face the industrial facade and its security equipment. The scene then opens up as the camera walks toward the entrance of the gun shop, finally approaching a male and female guard standing stationary beside the metal double doors.
